extension.description: Search and play video from your EasyNews account inside Kodi. Browse saved newsgroups, search history, play history, TMDB discovery, downloads folder, and optional split-file lookup. Report issues, request features, Buy Me A Coffee on Github [COLOR yellow]https://github.com/tetsuosoft/EasyNewsKodi[/COLOR]
extension.disclaimer: This add-on is not affiliated with EasyNews. You need a valid EasyNews membership and are responsible for complying with their terms of service and applicable law.
extension.news: v6.5.1 - Search cache — Revisit the same search faster when paging back or switching size. Cache saved for 30 mins. - Video size — Default to All, 720p, 1080p, or 4K; change anytime from the main menu or search results. - Account usage — Main menu shows plan and gigs left; tap to refresh. - Better EasyNews routing — Streams use your account's best route / server farm when available; Tools can show your current route. - TMDB discovery — Browse and search movies and TV; drill into episodes and search EasyNews in one tap.
